name: Jamf: Group Administrators Filtered Relationships
description: Targeted Filtering that limits results to starting jamf_Group nodes starting with 'TENANT' in the name and only show edges/relationships specified by r that are one of the three specified edges
query:
MATCH p=(s)-[r]->(t)
WHERE s.name STARTS WITH 'TENANT'
AND s.primarykind = 'jamf_Group'
AND (t.name STARTS WITH 'UPDATE' OR t.name STARTS WITH 'SOL')
AND (type(r) = 'jamf_UpdateAccounts' OR type(r) = 'jamf_CreateAccounts' OR type(r) = 'jamf_AdminTo')
RETURN p
LIMIT 1000
